creator: spry@anarchy.in.the.ph
text:
Hello

Same problem for FreeBSD 9.1, but this 1-line Makefile change fixes the 
build, and runs as before.

+++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++

mars@spry:~> apcaccess
APC      : 001,044,1084
DATE     : 2012-10-15 17:56:35 +0800
HOSTNAME : spry.xxx.xxxxxxxx.xxxx
VERSION  : 3.14.10 (13 September 2011) freebsd
UPSNAME  : SPRY
CABLE    : USB Cable
DRIVER   : USB UPS Driver
UPSMODE  : Stand Alone
STARTTIME: 2012-10-15 11:42:07 +0800
MODEL    : Back-UPS CS 650
STATUS   : ONLINE
LINEV    : 224.0 Volts
LOADPCT  :  43.0 Percent Load Capacity
BCHARGE  : 100.0 Percent
TIMELEFT :  17.8 Minutes
MBATTCHG : 5 Percent
MINTIMEL : 3 Minutes
MAXTIME  : 0 Seconds
OUTPUTV  : 230.0 Volts
SENSE    : Medium
DWAKE    : 000 Seconds
DSHUTD   : 000 Seconds
LOTRANS  : 180.0 Volts
HITRANS  : 266.0 Volts
RETPCT   : 000.0 Percent
ITEMP    : 29.2 C Internal
ALARMDEL : 30 seconds

LINEFREQ : 60.0 Hz
LASTXFER : Low line voltage
NUMXFERS : 0
TONBATT  : 0 seconds

XOFFBATT : N/A
SELFTEST : NO
STESTI   : None
STATFLAG : 0x07000008 Status Flag
MANDATE  : 2005-12-17
SERIALNO : QB0551336856
BATTDATE : 2005-12-17
NOMOUTV  : 230 Volts
NOMINV   : 230 Volts
NOMBATTV :  12.0 Volts
FIRMWARE : 817.v3.I USB FW:v3
END APC  : 2012-10-15 17:56:56 +0800
mars@spry:~>

mars@spry:~> uname -a
FreeBSD spry.xxx.xxxxxxxx.xxxx 9.1-RC2 FreeBSD 9.1-RC2 #0: Mon Oct  8 
16:40:18 PHT 2012 
root@firstcut.xxx.xxxxxxxx.xxxx:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/XXXX  amd64
mars@spry:~>


+++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
